item.title: Got a jamon at Costco and been eating it for over a month

Jamon slicing is harder than you'd think. This took about and hour
Jamon and eggs
Jamon on bagel
Jamon and congee
Jamon
Orzo carbonara with jamon
Jamon sammies pressed in a george foreman
Gnocchi with mushroom cream sauce and thinly shaved jamon
Jamon and egg tacos
Jamon and beer
Jamon on chips
Jamon pizza
Jamon and waffles
Jamon, egg, and cheese on bagel
Beans with jamon, cabbage with jamon, eggs without jamon
Cookie near jamon
Jamon and potato chowder
Jamon Big mac
Jamon, egg, and bean and jamon tacos
Jamon, mushroom, and green onion quiche
Jamon and olive easy mac
Jamon and French toast
Jamon penne alfredo
Jamon poutine
Jamon burger on toast
Jamon carnitas tacos
Jamon, fermented soy bean, and turnip green soup
Jamon rice bowl
Jamon dutch baby
Jamon chili dogs and japchae
Jamon cheesy toast
Jamon deviled eggs
Jamon, ham, and sides
Jamon and bean soup
Cheesecake near jamon
Jamon and ham fried rice
Jamon and ham omelette, jamon and ham hash
Jam on hamon on cheesy tomato toast
Jamon and corn chowder
Jamon, sour cream, and caviar on chips. The caviar was a gift. First time trying it. It tasted like shit. Literally, like fishy shit. Can't believe people buy this stuff
Jamon frites
Jamon and ham toastie
Chicken soup with rice and jamon
Kimchi fried rice with jamon
Green eggs and jamon
Minced jamon
Jamon on bagel
Jam on jamon on brie. @dogmeatsfood on the social things

item.title: Lock him up Already!
item.description: There are exactly 301 days until Decision 2024 This TRAITOR to America is looking to unleash Project 2025, f**k me it's some scary shit, check it out https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Project_2025 It's up to YOU to stop this dangerous march towards FASCISM! First things first .... register to vote / check your registration ... vote.org Secondly get involved, here are some handy links https://runforsomething.net/run/candidate-support-system/ https://www.turnoutpac.org/ https://justicedemocrats.com/ https://ballotpedia.org/Election_results,_2022:_Uncontested_races_by_state Why: https://www.axios.com/2023/11/13/trump-loyalists-2024-presidential-election Do your part today to protect DEMOCRACY!

item.title: Anouska De Georgiou - "installed" at a Donald Trump apartment in 1997
item.description:
This is Anouska De Georgiou around 1997. Anouska grew up as part of an affluent family in England. In the mid-1990s, Anouska fell in with the wrong crowd, namely Jeff Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell. After some subtle grooming, getting flown around the world on Epstein's private planes to exotic destinations, including his "Lolita Island", it was onto the penalty phase, or as Anouska put it, "By the time I was being raped, it was too late." Anouska was part of the group of victimized women who helped press the case against Jeff Epstein and Maxwell, along with lead accuser, Virginia Roberts Giuffre who was recruited into Epstein's sex ring WHEN SHE WAS WORKING AT MAR-A-LAGO. No, not kidding. MeidasTouch recently unearthed a UK tabloid "around town" type fluff piece (1997) where Anouska De Georgiou is mentioned by name in relation to Trump. Here's the quotation: "Just weeks after ditching his second wife, America's best-known billionaire Donald Trump has fallen under the spell of a 20-year-old English girl. Trump, 50, who has failed in his bid to secure the services of Princess Diana's butler Paul Burrell, was in search of another British trophy when he met London model Anouska De Georgiou at a party in Manhattan. Several American millionaires already had their eyes on Anouska. But she was there with Robert Maxwell's daughter Ghislaine, who has introduced several of her attractive friends to the property developer. And none of his would-be rivals owned a vast mansion in Florida like Donald does: Mar-a-Lago (where I have dined with him and his outgoing wife Marla) is enough to make any young girl go weak at the knees. After their meeting, Trump flew Madam Maxwell and the model south to the sunshine state, where all three enjoyed a happy weekend together. When they returned to New York, Anouska was installed in one of Donald's many apartments there." So apparently, it looks like Anouska was sex trafficked to one of Trump's apartments in plain view of the media and nobody thought to question why a 20 year old British girls would be shacking up with a 50 year old twice married man. This article was also cited in Vanity Fair in a Jan 21, 2021 article by Craig Unger. "At another event that year, according to the Sunday Mail, Trump, then 50, seemed to fall for a friend of Maxwell’s, 20-year-old London model Anouska De Georgiou, and flew her and Maxwell to Mar-a-Lago for the weekend, after which he installed De Georgiou in “one of Donald’s many apartments” in New York." De Georgious would later tell NBC News, "Jeffrey Epstein manipulated me, corrupted me, and sexually assaulted me,” she said, adding that the abuse was “devaluing beyond measure” and “lasted several years." It's also notable, thanks to the flight logs shuttling people to and from Epstein's "Lolita Island" that we see Trump's name show up no less than 7 times on the logs (he went more often but the information wasn't always captured). Can we all agree that this orange "man", of whom Judge Lewis A Kaplan said, in relation to the fact that E Jean Carroll said Trump raped her, that her words were "substantially true", is a clear and present menace to women? References and other reading: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/how-british-teen-model-was-lured-jeffrey-epstein-s-web-n1056901 https://www.thefreelibrary.com/How+suite!+Trump%27s+Brit+of+all+right.-a061140675 https://www.vanityfair.com/news/2021/01/jeffrey-epstein-and-donald-trump-epic-bromance https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2024/1/2/2214956/-When-Jeffrey-Epstein-s-list-is-released-only-one-name-really-matters
Flight log data capturing Trump going to Lolita Island in 1993. He would go 4 times in 1993, then once in 1994, 1995, 1997.
Anouska De Georgiou in 2019.
Photo taken in 1997, the same year Anouska De Georgiou was "installed" in an apartment for Trump to access her.
item.dc:creator: Adamarket

item.title: Former trump DHS official, Miles Taylor, explains how he literally had to write highly classified national security memos at a first grade reading level so trump could understand them
item.description: Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote

item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: Ramblings from a time forgotten
item.description: All things considered, I've been a member of Imgur for a long time, and before then, I was lurking. I was scrolling a meme dump earlier, and I found myself reminiscing of arguably the inventor of the Imgur meme dump, @Wadjet. I then just kind of entered a rabbit hole of memory about what this site once was. Pictured above: @alan and @Sarah from Camp Imgur. Now, I wasn't in a position to attend (I was broke AF in 2015, and a flight from Michigan to Cali wasn't in the cards) but I remember the hype, and seeing the stories posted here. The jokes about just how awkward it'd be, and my personal opinion that a bunch of memelords+alcohol would be an interesting combination (turns out it was, since I'm pretty sure there was an Imgur baby). Old names like @artsparkle and @fartharder and @kylecorn all began resurfacing in my mind. A more simple time, where a few thousand people on the internet came together to laugh at stories and appreciate stuff. I remember there used to be pictures of a yam in a plexiglass container on a desk at Imgur HQ with no explanation, you just remembered how it got there. I remember people posting tours of the HQ and how friendly it all used to seem *insert 'V for Vendetta' GIF about something being terribly wrong with this country* The fact of the matter is, this site hasn't been what it used to be in a long time. Advertising has taken hold in a wild way (as I type this I have a a banner ad at the bottom of my screen advertising some kind of Monopoly game), quality control has gone to hell, the mods (if any even exist anymore) aren't the same (no longer dedicated people trying to curtail actual issues, but just another faceless entity), and the engagement from the community is just bleh at best. Comments and interactions feel far more topical, there aren't any more long storied jokes that are years in the making. I warned you in the title that this would be rambling. I truly have no planned ending to this. Imgur used to be a fun and interesting place, and coming here used to be something special (at times) and everything used to feel much more real and accessible. I'm still scrolling, because Imgur still serves as a good distraction from the unfortunate reality known as life, but at the end of the day the community I originally fell in love with is long dead and gone. *FP Edit* Huh, my first ever FP post was me rambling about how this site isn't what it used to be. I don't know if id consider it ironic, but still interesting. Send whatever you want (or dont, im not a cop).
item.dc:creator: FirefighterCaboose
